---
title: "Programme"
subtitle: "15–19 June 2026, Lorentz Center, Leiden"
---

## Overview

| Day | Theme |
|-----|-------|
| **Day 1** | Foundation Setting |
| **Day 2** | Methodological Exploration |
| **Day 3** | Integration & Refinement |
| **Day 4** | Knowledge Transfer Tools |
| **Day 5** | Consolidation & Future Directions |

---

## Detailed Schedule

### Day 1 — Foundation Setting (Mon 15 June)

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Arrival and registration |
| 10:00–10:30 | Welcome and opening by the Lorentz Center |
| 10:30–12:00 | Icebreakers · Introduction to Survival Analysis (lecture + Q&A) |
| 12:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Introduction to Infectious Disease Modeling (lecture + Q&A) · Form mixed groups · Introduce case study |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Groups present first ideas on how to approach their case study |
| 17:00–19:00 | Welcome reception |

---

### Day 2 — Methodological Exploration (Tue 16 June)

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Small group work: explore data, develop analysis plans, begin implementation |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Continue analyses · Prepare preliminary findings |
| 12:00–12:30 | Keynote: IDM perspective |
| 12:30–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Intergroup session: groups compare analysis plans · Separate and refine |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Discuss findings across groups |
| 18:30 | Conference dinner |

---

### Day 3 — Integration & Refinement (Wed 17 June)

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Open discussion: ideas, challenges, outstanding questions |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Refine analysis plan · Implement · Prepare code examples |
| 12:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Continue case study work in small groups |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Group progress reports · Identify key learnings |

---

### Day 4 — Knowledge Transfer Tools (Thu 18 June)

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Introduce "Ten Simple Rules" · Brainstorm · Form writing and coding teams |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Begin vignette development · Document code examples · Draft Ten Simple Rules |
| 12:00–12:30 | Keynote: SA perspective on case studies |
| 12:30–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Continue vignette development |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Review draft Ten Simple Rules |

---

### Day 5 — Consolidation & Future Directions (Fri 19 June)

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | **Plenary:** Finalize Ten Simple Rules · Present vignettes and code examples |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Finalize action plans · Assign post-workshop responsibilities · Closing celebration |
| 12:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Optional activities |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | Optional plenary / wrap-up |
